metadata.title: Build a governed SRX ACE workflow for sales offer generation that integrates compliance lens validation, handles multi-runtime confusion chaos input, and produces a compilable artifact with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Build a governed SRX ACE workflow for sales offer generation that integrates compliance lens validation, handles multi-runtime confusion chaos input, and produces a compilable artifact with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Workflow processes chaotic input without failure.; Compliance lens correctly identifies and flags missing or ambiguous elements.; Validation gates produce clear pass/fail outcomes.; Final artifact contains all SR8-required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.; Artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 compiler.

in_scope.item: The workflow must accept a sales offer request with potentially missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must apply compliance lens rules, validate against SR8 governance standards, and output a structured artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Workflow processes chaotic input without failure.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Compliance lens correctly identifies and flags missing or ambiguous elements.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates produce clear pass/fail outcomes.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Final artifact contains all SR8-required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 compiler.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.workflow_objective: Build a governed SRX ACE workflow for sales offer generation that integrates compliance lens validation, handles multi-runtime confusion chaos input, and produces a compilable artifact with explicit validation gates.

workflow_phases.item: The workflow must accept a sales offer request with potentially missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must apply compliance lens rules, validate against SR8 governance standards, and output a structured artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections.

validation_gates.item: Workflow processes chaotic input without failure.
Compliance lens correctly identifies and flags missing or ambiguous elements.
Validation gates produce clear pass/fail outcomes.
Final artifact contains all SR8-required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.
Artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 compiler.

receipt_contract.item: sections: objective: string; scope: string; constraints: array of strings; success_criteria: array of strings; output_contract: object with artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, sections

validation_gates: gate_id: GATE-001; name: Input Sanity Check; description: Verify input is not empty and contains at minimum a request identifier.; pass_condition: input.request_id exists and is non-empty; gate_id: GATE-002; name: Compliance Lens Activation; description: Ensure compliance_lens is applied and all regulatory fields are present.; pass_condition: compliance_lens.active == true and all required regulatory fields are non-null; gate_id: GATE-003; name: Chaos Input Resolution; description: Resolve multi_runtime_confusion by normalizing runtime targets and deduplicating conflicting directives.; pass_condition: no unresolved runtime conflicts remain; gate_id: GATE-004; name: SR8 Section Completeness; description: Confirm all five SR8-required sections are present and non-empty.; pass_condition: objective, scope, constraints, success_criteria, output_contract all present and non-empty

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
